items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the SCIM sync run state and failure visibility, but there is no evidence provided that directly addresses this requirement. The prior steps focus on other aspects of the saga lifecycle, such as resource creation and booking processes, without mentioning SCIM sync run state or failure visibility. Therefore, it is unclear if this requirement has been satisfied or if there is a gap.
